name: Prompt/scenario generator
description:
Generates prompts for you. Mainly focuses on ships. (A bit buggy sometimes)
___
⚠️WARNING⚠️ Some prompts may contain violence or other sensitive topics. Hopefully the bot stays clear of such topics if the user does not ask for them. 
___
Please keep in mind that it is not perfect, but if you’re struggling to come up with something, this may help. 

Known issues: LLM may cause the bot to start roleplaying / story building instead of providing a simple prompt.
creator: VaanRatsbane
